items.name_en: Size change chip, custom top-grain cowhide
items.name_cn:
Size change chip, custom top-grain cowhide
Top-tier original order
M45497 Black M45555 Beige
This NeoNoé medium bucket bag features LV letters and Monogram flowers printed and embossed on leather for a striking look. The interior pocket securely holds valuables, and the adjustable shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear.
Detailed features 26.0 x 26.0 x 17.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Full metal hardware, top-tier original sample, code-changing chip. Gaston-Louis Vuitton's 1932 champagne bag meets contemporary trends, transforming into the NéoNoé bucket bag, embodying heritage beauty. Monogram canvas outlines soft lines, paired with colored leather trim and matching multi-layered glued lining. Monogram coated canvas - smooth calfskin trim - microfiber lining - center zip pocket - detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!!

M46041 Large Grey Print, M45976 Large Black

The classic S-lock and leather key pouch highlight the brand's heritage, while ample space, a close-to-body silhouette, and multiple carrying options make it a great choice for business or leisure.
